revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Flag template system]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} == Usage == ; {{tlc|naval|nation|variant|size={{var|optional}}|name={{var|optional}}}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national naval force article. === Parameters === * {{para||nation}} – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter [[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code. * {{para||variant}} (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Note that the standard behaviour of this template is to use the naval variant if present, so there is no need to specify this variant in the template call. * {{para|size}} (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size. * {{para|name}} (optional) – Can be used to change the wikilink display text. == Examples == === Brazil === * {{tlc|naval|Brazil}} → {{naval|Brazil}} === Georgia === * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|naval-1997}} (1997 to 2004) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)}} (2004 to 2009) * {{tlc|naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} → {{naval|Georgia (country)|coast guard}} === Netherlands === * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands|navy}} → {{naval|Netherlands|navy}} ([[naval jack]]) * {{tlc|naval|Netherlands}} → {{naval|Netherlands}} ([[naval ensign]]) === Russia / Soviet Union === * {{tlc|naval|Russia}} → {{naval|Russia}} (naval jack from {{circa|1701}} to 1924 and since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Empire}} → {{naval|Russian Empire}} (naval ensign from 1712 to 1917) * {{tlc|naval|Russian Republic}} → {{naval|Russian Republic}} (naval ensign from 1917 to 1918) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia|naval-1918}} (naval ensign from 1918 to 1920) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Russia}} → {{naval|Soviet Russia}} (naval ensign from 1920 to 1923) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1924}} (naval ensign from 1923 to 1935) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|naval-1935}} (naval ensign from 1935 to 1950) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union}} → {{naval|Soviet Union}} (naval ensign from 1950 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Soviet Union|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign from 1983 to 1992) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|navy-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|navy}} → {{naval|Russia|navy}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval-1992}} (naval ensign from 1992 to 2000) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} → {{naval|Russia|VV MVD naval}} (naval ensign since January 1, 2001 to 2016) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval-2016}} (naval ensign from 2016 to 2019) * {{tlc|naval|Russia|NGF naval}} → {{naval|Russia|NGF naval}} (naval ensign after 2019) === United Kingdom === * {{tlc|naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} → {{naval|Kingdom of Great Britain}} (1707 to 1800) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland}} (1801 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom}} → {{naval|United Kingdom}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-reserve}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|government}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|government}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-GS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|RFA}} (1905 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA-1905}} (1922/1927 to 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RFA}} (since 1969) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RMAS}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} → {{naval|United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland|civil}} (1864 to 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-merchant}} (since 1922/1927) * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|RNLI}} * {{tlc|naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} → {{naval|United Kingdom|naval-RNLI}} === United States === * {{tlc|naval|United States}} → {{naval|United States}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
